problem id: c60481e7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) OR SHR(6)

examples:
  10000111 -> 11100011
  00011101 -> 01000111
  01110100 -> 00011101
  00001000 -> 00000010
  00110110 -> 10001101
  10001001 -> 01100010
  00111011 -> 11001110
  11011011 -> 11110111
  11001111 -> 11110011

query: 01100001
predicted answer: 01011001
